description: OLMoE fused residual add and Llama-style RMSNorm returning both sum and normalized output.
name: olmoe_residual_add_rms_norm
reference:
# Source: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/aad13b87ed59f2afcfaebc985f403301887a35fc/src/transformers/models/olmoe/modeling_olmoe.py#L414-L419
# Source: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/aad13b87ed59f2afcfaebc985f403301887a35fc/src/transformers/models/olmoe/modeling_olmoe.py#L58-L63
import torch

def run(eps, residual, weight, x):
    summed = residual + x
    s = summed.to(torch.float32)
    normed = s * torch.rsqrt((s * s).mean(-1, keepdim=True) + eps) * weight
    return normed.to(summed.dtype), summed
